=== empty
# Empty text input with no value.
widget: textinput
title: Input
width: 24
height: 3
===
╔═ Input ══════════════╗
║[····················]║
╚══════════════════════╝

=== with_value
# Text input pre-populated with a value.
widget: textinput
title: Input
width: 24
height: 3
value: hello world
===
╔═ Input ══════════════╗
║[hello world·········]║
╚══════════════════════╝
